name: Mona
subtitle: Apps for trans people's health
description: Take control of your hormonal health with Mona. We make apps for trans people's health.

apps.name: Mona - HRT journal
apps.subtitle: Your hormonal journal
apps.localizedDescription:
Take control of your hormonal health with Mona, the fully local, open-source app designed to help you track, understand, and manage your hormone journey.

Why Mona is different:
- Completely private: All your data stays on your device. Nothing is sent to servers.
- Open source: The app is fully open source, allowing maximum transparency and contributions from the community.
- Free for life: No subscriptions, no premium features. Mona is free for everyone.

Medication reminders:
- Add your medication regimens
- Get detailed info for each upcoming dose (quantity, date, side, missed doses)
- Receive notifications so you never miss a dose

Manage your medication stock efficiently:
- Keep track of each medication in stock
- Quantities are automatically updated with each intake

Hormone level graphs: 
- For users on estradiol monotherapy, visualize simulated hormone levels over time
apps.versionDescription:
- you can now add as many notifications as you want for a schedule. each schedule has its own notifications !
- [android] update the app directly from the settings ! future versions won't require you to download the update yourself. this feature also allows for automatic update check.
- adds a button to add an intake at any time. check it out on the intakes page !
- you can now edit previous intakes
- adds a field to specify the needle dead space when taking an injection
- fixes a bug where injections would show at the wrong day on the graph
- fixes a bug causing notifications to fail for some users

versions.localizedDescription:
- you can now add as many notifications as you want for a schedule. each schedule has its own notifications !
- [android] update the app directly from the settings ! future versions won't require you to download the update yourself. this feature also allows for automatic update check.
- adds a button to add an intake at any time. check it out on the intakes page !
- you can now edit previous intakes
- adds a field to specify the needle dead space when taking an injection
- fixes a bug where injections would show at the wrong day on the graph
- fixes a bug causing notifications to fail for some users

- new exclusive pk values inferred using Esterlabe.jl/estrannaise models and data
- new molecules : raloxifene and tamoxifen
